verses.text: Topa zahtakin ama thu a zui mi khempeuh thupha ngah mi ahi hi
Na khut tawh na sep thaman na ne ding a, na lung damin na mavang ding hi
Nangma inn sungah na zi, a gah pha mahmah leenggui tawh kibang ding a, na sabuai kiimah a tu na tate, oliv no dawng hilhhelh tawh kibang ding uh hi
En un, Topa a zahtak mi tua bangin thupha kipia ding hi
Topa in Zion panin nang thupha hong pia hen la, na nuntak sung tawntung Jerusalem' nopsakna mu ta in
Na tute a mu dingin hong siam ta hen. Israel tungah nopna om ta hen!
